candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line for historical years; preferable to 'Total revenue' because 'Total revenue' appears to include 'Other income'.
Direct sales line for the most recent year; clearly matches revenue from core operations.
Broader revenue total, but appears to include 'Other income' in some years, so less preferred for pure top-line sales.
COGS, not revenue.
Operating expense total, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Tax line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Incl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue line.
Liability/deferred revenue style balance sheet item, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Used a priority list because the company appears to change the top-line label over time. Excluded 'Total revenue' because it appears to include 'Other income' (e.g., 562.6 = 556.16 + 6.44), so it is not the cleanest sales measure.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line on the income statement; best match for COGS/cost of sales.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense.
Direct COGS-style total, but appears only in one year and mirrors 'Cost of material'; less useful than the recurring line.

variables.notes: Selected the recurring direct cost line. 'Cost of Revenues - Total' appears to duplicate the same concept only in the latest year.

candidates.why: Clear overhead/personnel cost component above EBIT; suitable SG&A component.
Broad overhead operating expense bucket above EBIT; suitable SG&A component excluding D&A.
Subcomponent within 'Other Operating Expenses'; not consistently complete across years.
Dedicated R&D row exists but appears below EBIT in the statement order, so should not be included in XSGA here.
Supplemental capitalized R&D item, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet/development asset label, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Chose the best overhead buckets above EBIT. Did not include 'R&D' because it appears below EBIT in the preview, and did not use 'Other Other Operating Expenses' because it looks like a subcomponent of 'Other Operating Expenses' rather than a fuller recurring bucket.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization related to R&D, not the core R&D expense line.
Dedicated R&D expense line; best match for research and development expense.
Capitalized supplemental item, not the primary expense line.

candidates.why: Amortization supplemental, not direct R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet item, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped the dedicated R&D row. It appears below EBIT in the statement order, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Placeholder/empty-looking line; not a reliable recurring interest expense line.
Too broad; appears to include FX and other finance items beyond recurring interest.
Direct recurring interest expense component; strong fit for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Direct recurring lease-interest component, but overlaps with the supplemental row in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component and provides coverage in years where the main line is missing.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest components over broad 'Financial expenses', which appears contaminated by FX and other finance items. Chose the supplemental lease-interest line rather than the non-supplemental lease-interest line to avoid duplicate-label overlap while still covering years where the main line is absent.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.
Component/unclear equity bucket, not total equity.
Component bucket, not full equity attributable to owners.
Best available total equity line on the balance sheet; no separate parent-only equity line is shown.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate 'equity attributable to owners/parent' line is visible, so used 'Total Equity'. Per the equity rule, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is visible on the provided balance sheet.
